text_block_list.text:
One day, El Condor Pasa and Grass Wonder are
training on their own.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You're just running recklessly... You need to pace
yourself.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh... I know my trainer worked hard to come
up with this training plan, but I just can't do it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I got it! What about that over there?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hang on, El...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Waaa-taaa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Soaring into the ring with her fists of fury... the
Condor Monk is hereee!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering where you went... Why did you
change your clothes?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Silly Grass! You just don't get it.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But that's okay, I'll just explain—or better yet, I'll show you!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Waaa-chaaa!

El Condor Pasa shouts and then dashes a lap
around the track.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
How was that?! Behold, the spirit and stamina of
the Condor Monk! I feel power coursin' through
me!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Incredible... But, how?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's all thanks to my outfit!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
When I wear the clothes of a powerful monk, I
inherit that strength!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
For a warrior, an outfit is a kind of beacon
guiding them to their goals. It's also a reminder to
work hard and fulfill your dreams!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I think this is what my papa meant when he would
tell me about his wrestling outfits!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I see. I think I can understand that.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: When I put on a kimono, I feel at peace.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! Now you're gettin' it! Sometimes, you gotta
dress for the part you want!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna wear all kinds of outfits and become
the hella strong, hella unbeatable El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. What should I wear next to get even
stronger?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I know, right?! Now, what kind of outfit should I
wear to get stronger?!
choice_data_list: A kimono could help you keep your calm.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I see! In that case...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I want Grass to teach me everything about
kimonos!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
With pleasure. I'll choose something that suits you
well. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Why not work on having a Japanese mindset as
well? It might help you stay calm.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oooh! What should I do exactly?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
First, you should work on sitting properly. I think
it'll help you relax and stay calm.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Y-you mean sitting on top of my legs?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But it makes my legs tingle... Well, if it'll make me
stronger, then... Nnngh!

El Condor Pasa struggles with paying the price for
strength.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! A martial arts uniform! Just like in the old
movies!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The kind you'd wear when you thrust your fist into
a waterfall!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Let's do it right now! I'll split that waterfall with
this here fist!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I feel like those who train under waterfalls are
usually on a spiritual journey, not a physical one...
More importantly, where are you planning on
finding a waterfall?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh! Good point! There aren't really any close by...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh well. Just wearing the outfit should be enough
to feel differently, right?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's true! Thank you, Grass! I almost lost sight
of that!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Let's do some training in a martial arts uniform
next! Even if it's not quite as effective as training
under a waterfall, I'm sure we'll see results!

A few days later, El Condor Pasa tells me how
much fun she had training dressed up as a martial
artist.
